When the pillars and doors are mounted by birds and the
like (i.e. reptiles, bees etc.), when they shake, fall or are placed
wrongly, the effects will be the same as those prescribed for Indra's
Banner.
[Many bad effects have been enumerated in XLIII 62-66 supra
for Indra's Flag being occupied by vultures, owls etc.]
